description_long: This chapel is a small, stone religious building with a steeply pitched roof covered in weathered tiles and a prominent bell tower rising from one side. The front facade features a large circular stained glass window with a rose pattern above a wooden arched doorway, flanked by robust stone columns. The side walls are adorned with arched windows and subtle stonework, while the rear of the chapel is simpler, with blind arches and minimal ornamentation. The bell tower is tall and slender, topped with a cross and featuring a visible bell and louvered openings. The structure sits on a patch of grass, suggesting it is set apart from surrounding buildings, and the overall appearance is reminiscent of Gothic Revival architecture. Decorative crosses are present atop both the main roof and the bell tower, emphasizing its religious function.
description: A small stone chapel with a tall bell tower, arched windows, a rose-pattern stained glass window, and decorative crosses, set on a grassy base. The building features Gothic Revival elements and a prominent wooden entrance door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rose-pattern stained glass window, arched wooden entrance door, and the full height of the bell tower with a cross.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long tiled roof, arched side windows, and the bell tower's profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back wall with blind arches and the side of the bell tower.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the stonework, arched windows, and the bell tower's structure from a different angle.
attribute_stained_glass_windows: Yes, there is a large circular stained glass window with a rose pattern on the front facade, featuring blue and red hues. No specific imagery is visible beyond the geometric pattern.
attribute_steeple_or_bell_tower: Present; the chapel has a tall, slender bell tower on one side, topped with a cross and featuring a visible bell and louvered openings.
attribute_entrance_door_design: The main entrance door is arched, made of wood, and features a natural brown color with a small circular window above it. It is framed by thick stone columns and has a simple, robust design with minimal decorative elements.
